title: Battle of Altyr V (Galactic Civil War)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the battle during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]|the [[Battle of Altyr V|battle]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]}} {{Battle |prev=[[Second Battle of Coruscant]]''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' |conc= |next=[[Mission to negotiate supplies from Ka'Pa the Hutt]]''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]'' |image=[[File:Battle_of_Altyr_V.jpg]] |name=Battle of Altyr V |conflict=*[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] **[[Operation Shadow Hand]] |date=[[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]According to the opening crawl, ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]'' takes place five [[Standard year/Legends|standard years]] after the events of ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II]]''. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of ''Jedi Knight'' to [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]]. Using simple math, we can deduce that ''Mysteries of the Sith'' takes place in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]. |place=[[Altyr V]] |result=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] victory **The two [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] are destroyed **The New Republic evacuates its [[Altyr V base|base]] on Altyr V *[[Kyle Katarn]] begins searching for the [[Dark Force Temple]] on [[Dromund Kaas/Legends|Dromund Kaas]] |side1=New Republic |side2=[[Dark Empire]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[Captain/Legends|Captain]]/[[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] Kyle Katarn *[[Padawan/Legends|Apprentice]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] *A [[Unidentified New Republic commander|New Republic commander]] |commanders2=*Unknown |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1=*[[Squad Five (Altyr V|Squad Five]] *[[Squad Two (Altyr V)|Squad Two]] |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*New Republic [[Officer/Legends|officers]] *[[New Republic soldier/Legends|New Republic soldiers]] *One [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptor]] *One captured [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] *Two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] **Apprentice Mara Jade **Jedi Knight Kyle Katarn |forces2=*[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] **[[TK8252]] *Two [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-STs]] *[[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transports]] *[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] *[[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] *Two [[Imperial artificial asteroids|artificial asteroids]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*1 [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]] *A number of Republic soldiers |casual2=*Two AT-STs *Most of the invasion force |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} The '''Battle of Altyr V''' was one of the first conflicts between the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the [[Dark Empire]]. It was a part of the [[Operation Shadow Hand]] campaign. ==Overview== [[Altyr V]] was one of the battlefronts of the struggling [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. However, remnants of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] decided it was an ideal target to halt the Republic's advent. They had modified two [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] of the [[Altyr system/Legends|Altyr system]] as bombardiers and hoped to conquer the planet as a base. New Republic heroes [[Kyle Katarn]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] were on-station when the attack came, practicing [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]]. ==Battle== The New Republic [[Commander/Legends|commander]] told the duo that two asteroids were taking up an orbit around the planet and bombarding it while [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] were being landed; more reinforcements would arrive in two hours, sealing the fate of the base. Katarn thought that if a landing craft could be stolen, it could be landed on the asteroid and the asteroids could be destroyed. Mara Jade stayed to coordinate defenses. Katarn moved through the base, assisting Republic soldiers. While wandering in the base, he released a hangared [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]] which fell on the heads of stormtroopers, crushing them. Stormtroopers continued to pour through the base and the Republic commander ordered Kyle to shut the [[Blast door/Legends|blast doors]]. However, right before they shut, a [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bomber]] blasted them. Nevertheless, Katarn kept going and defeated several stormtroopers and [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-STs]] and restored power to sections of the base. Eventually he got to the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] and killed the stormtroopers guarding it. Then, he flew to the asteroid base. There he battled through the personnel until he got to the firing center where he had it fire at and destroy the other asteroid. He then set the asteroid to self destruct and left. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|But why take separate ships?''"
"''Because I've discovered some references to a hidden temple on the remote planet of Dromund Kaas. Something I don't think the Empire wanted anyone to see.''"
"''Are you going to investigate?''"
"''I feel...as if I have to.''"
"''And I suppose you have to do it alone.''"
"''Mara, I need you to say here. The New Republic needs you--''"
"''But my training! Yeah, I understand. Look, you know where to find me.''"
"''You've learned all you can from me. May the force be with you, Mara.''"
"''Try to stay out of trouble, Kyle.|[[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] and [[Kyle Katarn]] discussing their different assignments.|}} Following the battle, the New Republic finished evacuating the Altyr V base. Katarn and Jade went their separate ways, as Katarn discovered some hidden references to the [[Dark Force Temple|hidden temple]] on [[Dromund Kaas/Legends|Dromund Kaas]] and wanted to search for it and tasked Jade with helping the New Republic. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW Shadow Hand}} {{Interlang |es=Batalla de Altyr V (Guerra Civil Galáctica) }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Altyr V (Galactic Civil War), Battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Altyr V]] [[Category:Battles of Operation Shadow Hand]] [[Category:Evacuations]]
